definitions.englishToolInstance: The English-only tool count after collapsing duplicate URLs and then re-adding hidden country-family variants via toolCount.
definitions.subcategoryHub: A hub page with explicit window.HUB_CONFIG.toolIds. It is a container page, not a leaf tool.
definitions.categoryLeafTool: A live/new tool row that belongs directly to a category or is explicitly listed inside a subcategory hub.
definitions.htmlPage: A physical .html file on disk after excluding non-site folders such as node_modules and .playwright.
definitions.otherPublicPages: Public pages that are not tools, country routes, widgets, or internal dashboards. This is the closest bucket to "just pages".
